goal: linear_equiv_submodule_map[R, M, N](e, s).contains(y) = linear_map_preimage_submodule[R, N, M](e.dst, s, e.inv_fn).contains(y)
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: LinearEquiv[T0, T2, T1], x1: Submodule[T0, T2]) { linear_map_preimage_submodule[T0, T1, T2](x0.dst, x1, x0.inv_fn) = linear_equiv_submodule_map[T0, T2, T1](x0, x1) }[R, N, M](e, s)

goal: submodule_subset[R, N](linear_map_preimage_submodule[R, N, M](e.dst, s1, e.inv_fn), linear_map_preimage_submodule[R, N, M](e.dst, s2, e.inv_fn))
linear_equiv_submodule_map[R, M, N](e, s1) = linear_map_preimage_submodule[R, N, M](e.dst, s1, e.inv_fn)
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: LinearEquiv[T0, T2, T1], x1: Submodule[T0, T2]) { linear_map_preimage_submodule[T0, T1, T2](x0.dst, x1, x0.inv_fn) = linear_equiv_submodule_map[T0, T2, T1](x0, x1) }[R, N, M](e, s1)

goal: linear_equiv_submodule_map[R, M, N](e, s2) = linear_map_preimage_submodule[R, N, M](e.dst, s2, e.inv_fn)
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: LinearEquiv[T0, T2, T1], x1: Submodule[T0, T2]) { linear_map_preimage_submodule[T0, T1, T2](x0.dst, x1, x0.inv_fn) = linear_equiv_submodule_map[T0, T2, T1](x0, x1) }[R, N, M](e, s2)

goal: submodule_subset[R, N](linear_equiv_submodule_map[R, M, N](e, s1), linear_equiv_submodule_map[R, M, N](e, s2))
linear_map_kernel_submodule[R, M, N](e.src, e.dst, e.to_fn).contains(x) = (x = M.0)
linear_map_image_submodule[R, M, N](e.src, e.dst, e.to_fn).contains(y) = true
linear_map_kernel_submodule[R, N, M](e.dst, e.src, e.inv_fn).contains(y) = (y = N.0)
linear_map_image_submodule[R, N, M](e.dst, e.src, e.inv_fn).contains(x) = true
